content: We can frame the development of LLM self-reflection mechanisms as an iterative learning exercise structured after the high school English writing reflection workshop, where the original Reflexion agent framework borrows structured reflective feedback routines from language arts writing pedagogy to improve LLM self-critique. LLM outputs are treated like draft student essays, with self-reflection stepping into the role of both the student’s self-editing process and the instructor’s formative feedback to iteratively refine response quality.
